what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that links a board item to the dragnet-development channel and records when the attachment was added.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, with no body content
target uses the board:// URI scheme (board://item-275dd98d)
added timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata
Id prefix att- for attachment records
Target referenced by a board:// URI
Timestamp stored in ISO 8601 UTC format
concerns: The referenced board item is an opaque URI with no local context about its content or meaning
notes: A stub attachment record that records a board item being attached to the dragnet-development channel at 2026-06-24T01:32:22Z.
questions: What is the content or purpose of board item item-275dd98d?
Which specific message or thread in dragnet-development owns this attachment?
apparent_themes: Linking channel activity to board artifacts
intention_signals: Record that a specific board item is associated with the dragnet-development channel so channel memory can correlate discussions with board artifacts.
contribution: A timestamped, typed join record between a channel and a board item, giving a fusion system a concrete key for correlating channel activity with board artifacts.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a YAML-frontmatter channel attachment record (att-a7f8900f) of type board_items that links board://item-275dd98d to the dragnet-development channel with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: It was created to record that a board item was attached to the dragnet-development channel at a specific time.
